sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94049" key="sidhro/teuktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σῐδηρό-τευκτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n94049.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wrought of iron</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">βέλος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0451.tlg001:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epicr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
